browse.title: Browse plugins
browse.intro: Built-in activity types plus community add-ons the app has found. Community-approved plugins can issue credentials that count by default. Ones that haven't been reviewed yet still work, but their grades only count as your progress until the community reviews them.
browse.emptyDescription: Community add-ons arrive from other learners. Once someone publishes one, it will show up here.

installed.title: Plugins
installed.intro: Community-made learning and assessment activities. Each plugin runs in a locked-down sandbox with no internet access. You grant permissions (microphone, camera, and so on) one plugin at a time, the first time it needs them.
installed.installHeading: Add from a folder on this device
installed.installHintPrefix: Point to a folder on this device that holds its
installed.installHintSuffix: bundle. Soon you'll be able to add plugins straight from other learners.
installed.emptyDescription: Add a plugin above to unlock new learning and assessment activities.

errors.enterPath: Enter the path to a plugin folder.

installed.uninstallConfirm: Remove "{name}"? This deletes the plugin from this device. Courses that use it will stop working until you add it again.

detail.noGrants: No lasting permissions. The plugin will ask the first time it needs one.

docs.noReadme: This plugin doesn't include a guide.

permission.heading: {name} wants to {action}

capabilities.storage: save your progress on this device
capabilities.mlInference: run AI models right on your device

permission.sandbox: Plugins are made by the community and run in a safe sandbox.
permission.noAccess: It can't reach the internet or any other data on this device.

host.noCid: This activity uses a plugin, but its content ID is missing.
host.disabled: This plugin is turned off. Turn it back on in Settings → Plugins to use it.
host.noKinds: This plugin doesn't define any activities, so it can't run.
host.noGrader: This plugin is set up for grading but has no grader attached. The author needs to publish a fix.
